title: Border and travel health - Canada.ca
content:
## Border and travel health
General health information for travellers, and guidance for health professionals and the travel industry
- Travel-related diseases
- Travelling to receive medical care outside Canada

### Travel health notices
Potential health risks to travellers and recommended ways to help reduce them

### Travel advice and advisories
Country-specific advice on safety, security, local laws, customs, entry requirements, other travel issues

### Yellow fever vaccination centres
Find a health care site in your area that’s been designated a yellow fever vaccination centre

### Health and safety outside Canada
Safety and security abroad, travel health information, health and safety by types of travellers

### Sexual health and travel
Precautions to take to protect yourself from sexually transmitted infections (STIs) while travelling abroad

### Plan for your health before and during travel
Health-related tips when travelling abroad to help you stay healthy

### Mental health when travelling or living outside Canada
Preparing for and managing mental health challenges you may face while outside Canada

## For health professionals and the travel industry

### Travel health professionals
Guidance for travel-related diseases and vaccination

### Health guidance for the travel industry
Travelling Public Program, quarantine services, guidance for marine and cruise ship operators
- Public Health Agency of Canada
- Global Affairs Canada

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
